Veterans Benefits: Arkansas exempts military retired pay; state benefits include disabled-veteran property-tax relief, employment preference, education assistance, and hunting/fishing privileges.
Description: Camden is a south-central Arkansas city on the Ouachita River with low housing costs, a humid-subtropical climate, and river access. The nearby defense-manufacturing corridor includes an RTX/Raytheon careers location recorded in Camden and the Raytheon-Rafael SkyHunter facility in neighboring East Camden. The nearest listed VA clinic is in El Dorado, about 30 miles away by road.
